item.title: Lucy Letby: The Worst Nurse The UK Has Ever Seen
item.description: Lucy Letby was convicted of murdering and attempting to murder infants while working in a neonatal unit in England. The investigation, one of the largest in NHS history, relied on medical evidence, hospital records, and witness testimony. The case sparked widespread debate about patient safety, hospital oversight, and the handling of concerns raised by medical staff

media:content.media:title: Lucy Letby: The Worst Nurse The UK Has Ever Seen
media:content.media:description: Lucy Letby was convicted of murdering and attempting to murder infants while working in a neonatal unit in England. The investigation, one of the largest in NHS history, relied on medical evidence, hospital records, and witness testimony. The case sparked widespread debate about patient safety, hospital oversight, and the handling of concerns raised by medical staff
